Dept. 514, Judge: Linda Colfax, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: T. Ward #11918.

Vernon Goins II, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Robert Lopez and Roberto Lopez, were placed under oath and direct examined (as to the defaulted defendant Deion Westbrook).
Exhibit 1-Deed of Trust dtd. 08-15-08 ---------ID/EVID
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented (as to the the defaulted defendant), the court took the matter under submission. Counsel stipulated for the return of the exhibit in open court, and to prepare and submit a proposed judgment to Dept 514.

Rebecca S. Saelao, Esq. for Defendants LJL ------.
Parties settled and entered into a signed settlement agreement and stipulation for entry of judgment, filed in open court.

Court rules in favor of plaintiff for Judgment against Defeualted Defendant Deion Westbrook as follows:
Damages - $

Attorney fees $

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
